name: Omu Approaches
weather: Rain that smells of old stone
politics: Yuan-ti influence grows closer to Omu.
Most guides refuse to go further without great cause.
culture: Names of lost cities are spoken quietly.
Old warnings are treated as survival instructions.
rumours: A city swallowed by jungle still dreams.
Those who sleep near the markers wake with strange maps in their minds.
dmSecrets: The party may be watched long before they see enemies.
Approach markers are part warning, part key.
A recurring serpent symbol can seed later revelations.
